name: onesearch
description: Onesearch CLI workflow and provider bridge skills for Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Onesearch CLI and provider bridge skills.
interface.longDescription: A standalone local plugin for Onesearch CLI 0.2.2 workflows. It bundles the main Onesearch router skill plus workflow skills for current search, hot/trending lists, fetch, documentation lookup, and deep research, alongside provider skills for Context7, Exa, Tavily, Firecrawl, DeepWiki, AnySearch, and Zhipu.
defaultPrompt: Use $onesearch for current web research, hot/trending lists, and source-backed facts.
Use $onesearch-search or $onesearch-fetch for source and evidence workflows.
